name: wetzler
description: Rewrite Markdown with a configurable Vale-backed voice contract.

interface.shortDescription: Revise Markdown with a configured voice.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that prepares Markdown revision packets with Vale findings and the configured writing voice contract.
defaultPrompt: Rewrite this Markdown in my voice.
Lint this draft against my voice.
Propose voice rule updates from samples.
